title: Subject Identifiers for Security Event Tokens
abstract: Security events communicated within Security Event Tokens may support a variety of identifiers to identify subjects related to the event.  This specification formalizes the notion of Subject Identifiers as structured information that describes a subject and named formats that define the syntax and semantics for encoding Subject Identifiers as JSON objects.  It also establishes a registry for defining and allocating names for such formats as well as the JSON Web Token (JWT) "sub_id" Claim.
